name: Bisque Lobster or Other
recipeIngredient: Salt and fresh ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Plunge the lobsters into boiling water for 3-4 minutes.
2. Take them out of the boiling water and remove the tails. Cut the carcass into quarters, discarding the sacks. Crack the claws. Remove the meat from the tails and set aside.
3. In a large pot, melt the butter in the oil over medium heat. Sauté the carrot, onion, and celery until lightly browned.
4. Add all other ingredients except the cream and salt and pepper to the pot. Bring to a boil and cook for 45 minutes.
5. Strain the mixture into another pot using a fine cheesecloth.
6. Add the heavy cream and cook on medium-low heat for an additional 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Take the tail meat and shred it by hand (not too big). Add the shredded meat to the soup and continue cooking for another 5 minutes on medium-low heat.
9. Serve hot. This recipe can be made with lobster, shrimp, clams, or any seafood combination. For shrimp or clams, use 2 cups clam juice and 2 cups chicken broth instead of 4 cups chicken broth. Always add the seafood the last 5 minutes of cooking.
